vocab.meaning: trang phục phù hợp với khí hậu
vocab.example: Packing climate-appropriate attire is my top priority, as being underdressed for a cold snap can ruin the entire experience.

vocab.meaning: những hạn chế về mặt địa hình
vocab.example: Due to topographical constraints in the mountainous regions, I often opt for a lightweight rucksack instead of a bulky suitcase.

vocab.meaning: một cơn ác mộng về mặt hậu cần (sắp xếp đồ đạc/di chuyển)
vocab.example: Carrying excessive photography gear to a bustling metropolis can quickly become a logistical nightmare.

vocab.meaning: những thiết bị công nghệ không thể thiếu
vocab.example: Noise-canceling headphones and portable chargers have become indispensable gadgets for my long-haul flights.
I’ve learned to streamline my luggage by selecting versatile clothing items that can be layered easily.

vocab.meaning: các thiết bị/công cụ hỗ trợ định hướng
vocab.example: In areas with spotty internet connection, I rely on offline maps and other traditional navigational aids.

vocab.meaning: các tiện nghi được cung cấp sẵn
vocab.example: If the accommodation has ample amenities provided, I can afford to leave behind bulky toiletries.
Regardless of the destination, I always carry a few personal mementos to make my hotel room feel more like home.

vocab.meaning: danh sách kiểm tra toàn diện
vocab.example: I maintain a comprehensive checklist for different types of trips to ensure no critical item is overlooked.

vocab.meaning: thiết bị tiêu chuẩn cho các cuộc thám hiểm
vocab.example: For wilderness camping, carrying expedition-grade equipment is a matter of safety rather than just convenience.
